title: [kimi-review] coap_dtn.c: s_senml_pack_mutex declared but unused (dead code)
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_dtn.c:19 defines static K_MUTEX_DEFINE(s_senml_pack_mutex) and s_senml_pack at 17+49 is inited but neither the pack nor its mutex are ever locked or referenced in deaddrop_post/get, expire handler, or anywhere else in file (grep confirms). Violates 'No Dead Code' rule from AGENTS.md. Previous codereviews claimed 's_senml_pack used' but it isn't. P2. Also check if SenML encoding path missing entirely. --type=bug --labels=codereview
